---
hub_index: false
title: "How to Request a New Ontology Term"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

The FADS site no longer maintains a separate local term-request guide.

Use the canonical ontology repo docs instead:

- Submit requests: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/SUBMIT_REQUESTS_README.md>
- Contributor conventions: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md>
- Formal ontology docs: <https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon>

If you're trying to reuse an existing term in a salmon data package, start here first:

- <https://dfo-pacific-science.github.io/metasalmon/articles/reusing-standards-salmon-data-terms.html>
